title: RTF to PDF
metaDescription: Convert RTF (Rich Text Format) files to PDF. Preserve text formatting in your documents.
description:
RTF to PDF converts Rich Text Format files into PDF documents. RTF is a widely supported text format that includes basic formatting like fonts, colors, and styles.

Upload your RTF files and get clean PDF output while preserving text content and basic formatting. Perfect for converting legacy documents to modern PDF format.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload RTF File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .rtf file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Processing
howToUse.description: The tool will parse and convert the RTF content.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Legacy Conversion
useCases.description: Convert old RTF documents to modern PDF format.

useCases.title: Document Sharing
useCases.description: Share RTF documents in universally viewable PDF format.

useCases.title: Archive Documents
useCases.description: Archive RTF files in stable PDF format for long-term storage.

faq.question: What formatting is preserved?
faq.answer: Basic text formatting including fonts, paragraphs, and styles are converted. Complex RTF features may be simplified.

faq.question: Can I convert multiple RTF files?
faq.answer: Currently, one file is converted at a time. Use Merge PDF to combine multiple converted files.

faq.question: Are embedded images supported?
faq.answer: Text content is the primary focus. Embedded objects may not be rendered.
